song.title: Blessed Assurance (new)
song.lyrics: [V1] Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine O what a foretaste of glory divineHeir of salvation, Purchase of God Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood [V2] Perfect submission, all is at rest I in my Savior am happy and blessed Watching and waiting, looking above Filled with His goodness, lost in His love [C] This is my story, this is my song Praising my Savior all the day long This is my story, this is my song Praising my Savior all the day long [P1] Oh what a Savior, Wonderful Jesus (8x) [P2] Death could not hold You, You are victorious Praise to the risen King (2x) [C] Oh what a Savior, Wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior, Wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior, Wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior
song.author: Elevation Worship
